# SRIIO UI — Component Library

> Copy-paste-ready React + Tailwind CSS components for Next.js. MIT licensed. Zero runtime dependencies.

## Install

```bash
npm install @sriio/ui
```

## Live API

All component metadata and code is available via REST:

```
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components            → list all components
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components?q=button  → search
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components?category=Forms → filter by category
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components/{id}      → full code for one component
```

## MCP Server (for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "sriio-ui": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "sriio-ui-mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

Tools exposed: `list_components`, `get_component`, `search_components`

---

## Components (26 total)

Each component entry: id · title · category · variants · import

### Foundations
- badge · Badge · Foundations · 7 variants · `import { Badge, BadgeCount } from '@sriio/ui'`
- avatar · Avatar · Foundations · 4 variants · `import { Avatar, AvatarStack } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Display
- button · Button · Display · 6 variants · `import { Button } from '@sriio/ui'`
- spinner · Spinner · Display · 4 variants · `import { Spinner, Dots, Skeleton } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Forms
- input · Input · Forms · 5 variants · `import { Input, Textarea } from '@sriio/ui'`
- search · Search · Forms · 3 variants · `import { Search } from '@sriio/ui'`
- dropdown · Dropdown · Forms · 2 variants · `import { Dropdown } from '@sriio/ui'`
- radio · Radio Group · Forms · 3 variants · `import { RadioGroup } from '@sriio/ui'`
- checkbox · Checkbox · Forms · 5 variants · `import { Checkbox, Toggle } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Feedback
- alert · Alert · Feedback · 5 variants · `import { Alert } from '@sriio/ui'`
- toast · Toast · Feedback · 4 variants · `import { ToastProvider, useToast } from '@sriio/ui'`
- progress · Progress · Feedback · 3 variants · `import { ProgressBar, ProgressCircle } from '@sriio/ui'`
- empty-state · Empty State · Feedback · 3 variants · `import { EmptyState } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Overlay
- tooltip · Tooltip · Overlay · 4 variants · `import { Tooltip } from '@sriio/ui'`
- modal · Modal · Overlay · 2 variants · `import { Modal } from '@sriio/ui'`
- drawer · Drawer · Overlay · 2 variants · `import { Drawer } from '@sriio/ui'`
- popover · Popover · Overlay · 2 variants · `import { Popover } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Navigation
- tabs · Tabs · Navigation · 4 variants · `import { Tabs } from '@sriio/ui'`
- accordion · Accordion · Navigation · 2 variants · `import { Accordion } from '@sriio/ui'`
- steps · Steps · Navigation · 2 variants · `import { Steps } from '@sriio/ui'`
- pagination · Pagination · Navigation · 3 variants · `import { Pagination } from '@sriio/ui'`
- navigation · Navigation · Navigation · 4 variants · `import { TopNav, Sidebar, Breadcrumb, BottomTabs } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Data
- table · Table · Data · 2 variants · `import { Table } from '@sriio/ui'`

### Pickers
- date-picker · Date Picker · Pickers · 1 variant · `import { DatePicker } from '@sriio/ui'`
- time-picker · Time Picker · Pickers · 2 variants · `import { TimePicker } from '@sriio/ui'`
- file-upload · File Upload · Pickers · 2 variants · `import { FileUploadSingle, FileUploadBulk } from '@sriio/ui'`

---

## Usage with AI

To get the full React + TypeScript + Tailwind code for any component:

```
GET https://sriio.dev/api/components/button
```

Response includes:
- `code.react` — copy-paste JSX example
- `code.typescript` — prop types/interfaces
- `code.tailwind` — raw HTML with Tailwind classes (no npm needed)

## Theming

All components use your Tailwind config. Override the `accent` color palette in `tailwind.config.ts`:

```js
theme: {
  extend: {
    colors: {
      accent: colors.violet,   // or blue, indigo, emerald, etc.
    }
  }
}
```

## Source

- Docs: https://sriio.dev/docs
